summary: A central journey hero is framed by compact dual-segment cues or side persona cues so the page compares how different customer types experience the same flow.
composition_pattern: center journey, side segment cues, lower friction layer, optional summary edge
support_structure: left and/or right compact segment cues
lower friction or opportunity cards linked to journey stages
when_to_use: The page must compare at least two customer types across one shared journey
Segment differences matter as much as the stage sequence
avoid_when: There is only one clear customer type
The page needs a strong right-side insight column instead of dual segment context
